candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line with reported values; more specific and cleaner than header 'Revenues' and preferable to subtotal/total rows.
Reported revenue total that matches the main revenue values; useful as fallback if labeling changes.
Section/header label rather than the reported numeric line in this preview.

variables.notes: Used reported revenue lines as a priority list; do not use the header row 'Revenues'.

candidates.why: Standard cost-of-sales line and direct match for COGS.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Revenue including Operation & Maintenance (Utility) - Total
candidates.why: Duplicate-style alternative with identical values; less primary than the standard label.
Excludes depreciation and equals material expenses here, so narrower than total reported cost of revenues.

variables.notes: Selected the standard reported cost-of-revenues line rather than narrower or duplicate alternatives.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A line that already excludes R&D, matching the target best and avoiding totals/components that would double count.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Valid SG&A component, but not needed because an explicit populated SG&A excluding R&D row exists.
Too broad and includes non-SG&A items; use only if explicit SG&A is unavailable.

final_choice.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: Per rule hierarchy, selected only the explicit populated SG&A row. It is preferable to broader totals and already excludes R&D.

candidates.why: Direct reported R&D expense line for the period.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of prior capitalized R&D, not the current-period R&D expense target.
Capitalized portion only, not total expensed R&D line.

variables.notes: Used the direct current-period R&D expense line.

candidates.why: Direct interest expense line and best single-label match.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Very close alternative; identical values here and suitable as fallback if labels vary over time.
Net interest expense after interest income, less preferred than gross interest expense but usable fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Only a component of interest expense, so not preferred for the main XINT line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Provided as a priority list, preferring the direct interest expense line, then close alternatives if labeling changes.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best owner/parent-only equity line, which excludes minority interest and avoids double counting with MIB.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent parent-only equity concept and good fallback if the main label changes.
Also appears to represent parent common equity here; acceptable fallback.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Would risk including minority interest and hybrid items, so inferior for BE when parent-only equity exists.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-attributable equity lines to exclude minority interest from BE.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet minority interest / non-controlling interest line.
Income statement allocation line, not book minority equity on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Not a standalone MIB line and would double count if used with BE.

variables.notes: Selected the standalone minority-interest equity line; appears immaterial/zero in available years.
